name: Citi Trends Inc
business: Citi Trends is an off-price value retailer focused on Black customers, offering apparel, footwear, accessories, and home products. As of January 31, 2026, the company operated 590 stores in 33 states.

exposures.sentence: In fiscal 2025 we finalized the implementation of an AI-based allocation system across all merchandise categories.
In fiscal 2026, we expect to add an AI-based merchandise planning system and complete the implementation of upgraded camera systems, including AI-based facial recognition capabilities.
This new store expansion is guided by a disciplined approach leveraging AI tools and extensive data analysis designed to predict sales with approximately 90% accuracy.
In fiscal 2025, we continued to advance our technology ecosystem by leveraging AI capabilities in key areas such as merchandise allocation, loss prevention, and store operations.

catalysts.event: Open approximately 25 new stores and remodel approximately 50 stores
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate capital expenditures in fiscal 2026 in the range of $35 million to $40 million, primarily for opening approximately 25 new stores and remodeling approximately 50 stores.
In fiscal 2026, we expect to add an AI-based merchandise planning system and complete the implementation of upgraded camera systems, including AI-based facial recognition capabilities.

catalysts.event: Complete implementation of upgraded camera systems with AI-based facial recognition
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2026, we expect to add an AI-based merchandise planning system and complete the implementation of upgraded camera systems, including AI-based facial recognition capabilities.
